title: Structured observability — metrics and counters
purpose: Beyond tracing spans, operators need metrics: process count, message queue depths, GC frequency, scheduler utilization. This brief adds OpenTelemetry metrics for key VM health indicators.
task: Add OpenTelemetry metrics for VM health indicators.

requirements.title: VM health metrics
requirements.spec: Emit metrics for core VM state.
acceptance: Gauge: beamr.scheduler.utilization — fraction of time executing (not idle)
Gauge: beamr.memory.heap_words — total heap words allocated
Test: metrics emitted after running workload

requirements.title: Per-process metrics
requirements.spec: Emit per-process metrics for queue depth and reduction count.
acceptance: Metrics sampled at configurable interval (not every instruction)
Test: process with deep mailbox shows high queue_len metric

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement custom metric exporters — use standard OTel exporters
SHALL NOT emit per-instruction metrics — too expensive
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
